root_text.an4.225:1.1: …pe… Micchādiṭṭhiko hoti, micchāsaṅkappo hoti, micchāvāco hoti, micchākammanto hoti …pe… sammādiṭṭhiko hoti, sammāsaṅkappo hoti, sammāvāco hoti, sammākammanto hoti …pe….

translation_text.an4.225:1.1: “A foolish person … brims with much wickedness. … wrong view, wrong thought, wrong speech, wrong action. … An astute person … brims with much merit. … right view, right thought, right speech, right action. …”
